title: Senior Product Manager — Checkout
description: Own the checkout experience for 8M+ merchants. Drive conversion rate improvements through deep user research, A/B testing, and cross-functional collaboration with engineering and design.

title: Staff Software Engineer — Platform
description: Build and scale the core platform infrastructure powering CRED's financial products. Work on distributed systems, event streaming, and microservices at 10M+ user scale.

title: Growth Product Manager
description: Drive user acquisition and retention for Zepto's 10-minute grocery delivery. Own experiments across the funnel from install to repeat order, with a strong bias for data.

title: Senior Data Scientist — Risk
description: Build ML models to detect fraud and assess credit risk across PhonePe's payments and lending products. Own model development, deployment, and monitoring end-to-end.

title: Product Manager — Investments
description: Define the product vision for Groww's mutual funds and stock investing experience. Partner with design, engineering, and compliance to ship features for India's next 100M investors.

title: Engineering Manager — Mobile
description: Lead a team of 8 mobile engineers building Meesho's seller and buyer apps for Tier 2/3 India. Drive technical excellence, hiring, and roadmap execution for a 130M+ user product.

title: Senior Software Engineer — Backend
description: Design and build high-throughput microservices for Swiggy's order management and logistics platform. Work on problems at the intersection of real-time operations and scale.

title: Senior Product Manager — Developer Experience
description: Own the developer experience for BrowserStack's testing platform used by 50,000+ companies. Drive integrations with CI/CD pipelines, IDE plugins, and the CLI toolchain.

title: Product Marketing Manager
description: Shape how 30M+ developers discover and adopt Postman's API platform. Own go-to-market strategy, messaging, launch campaigns, and competitive positioning for new product lines.

title: Operations Manager — Dark Stores
description: Manage the end-to-end operations of Zepto's dark store network in Delhi NCR. Drive efficiency in picking, packing, and last-mile delivery while maintaining 10-minute SLAs.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer — Design Systems
description: Build and evolve Razorpay's design system used across 15+ product teams. Own component library architecture, accessibility, performance, and developer adoption.

title: Founding Product Manager
description: Be the first PM hire at a well-funded B2B fintech building embedded finance for Indian SMEs. Own the full product lifecycle from discovery to launch across lending and payments.

title: Data Analyst — Growth
description: Turn CRED's rich user data into growth insights. Own experiment analysis, funnel metrics, cohort studies, and dashboards that drive decisions for the growth and product teams.

title: Senior Product Manager — Merchant Tools
description: Build tools that help 1.5M+ Meesho sellers grow their business. Own the seller app, catalogue management, and business analytics suite for small entrepreneurs across India.

title: Machine Learning Engineer — Recommendations
description: Build real-time recommendation and personalisation systems for PhonePe's Switch platform. Work on embedding models, feature stores, and A/B testing infrastructure at 500M+ user scale.
